response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically competent senior/staff individual contributor with 15+ years of software development experience, but the profile falls far short of the CTO requirements. There is no evidence of engineering leadership at any scale — no team management, no org scaling, no architectural governance, and no executive-level responsibilities appear anywhere in the work history. The fintech exposure (RIDE Capital, ~15 months) is thin and tactical, not infrastructural. AI-agent involvement is nascent (current role, mentioned in passing) rather than a track record of production multi-agent systems. The role demands someone who has built and led engineering organizations; this resume presents a skilled craftsman, not an executive.
strengths: Long polyglot engineering career with genuine breadth across backend, embedded, mobile, and distributed systems
Current role touches agentic AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows), indicating early relevant exposure
Demonstrated microservices and high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second
concerns: Zero evidence of engineering leadership, people management, or team scaling — the JD requires 5+ years of senior technical leadership and scaling teams from 10 to 30+ people
No production multi-agent AI systems built or operated; AI experience appears limited to tooling contributions in the current role started April 2025
No fintech infrastructure depth (credit systems, real-time risk, payment flows, compliance across jurisdictions) beyond a 15-month developer stint at a tax-fintech startup

key_factors.factor: No production agentic AI track record
